name: Auto Research for Materials: Auditable AI-Scientist Workflows with Held-Out Transfer
summary: arXiv:2607.17100v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: An AI research agent can improve the score it sees without finding a modelling change that works on new materials. We ask a stricter question. Afte...
description: arXiv:2607.17100v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: An AI research agent can improve the score it sees without finding a modelling change that works on new materials. We ask a stricter question. After repeated experiments, does the selected change survive on data that never entered the loop, and can its code be reused? We separate the search into changes to features, models, representations, and...
author: Jingjie Ning, Xiaochuan Li, Shanshan Zhong, Ji Zeng, Guolin Ke
